hero_tagline: An IdentityV player who enjoys playing as Fire Investigator.
about_intro_1: Hi! I'm uJayden, I've been playing Identity V for several years from 2018 to now. I am not a professional player that in a top tier of ranking, but I enjoy the game and playing my favourite character, Florian Brand.
about_intro_2: Although I can play both survivor and hunter, I prefer survivor more. I like to play these mode: Ranked, Quick Match, and Duo Hunter. I don't play much of the other modes.
about_intro_3: Please feel free to invite me to team up or add me as a friend in the game! I will be glad to play with you and have fun together. However, I am not a professional player and may not be the best at the game. I may make mistakes sometimes, but I will try my best to play well and have fun with you!
favourite_character_p1: This is my favorite character in Identity V.
favourite_character_p2: I like Florian not only because he is cute and cool, but also because of his tragic backstory, which makes me sympathize with him.
favourite_character_p3: If you read Character Day letter carefully, you will found that he is actually a kind-hearted and caring character by nature. His darker and more unstable side only appeared because things happened at the orphanage. Although tragic backstories are a common storytelling technique, Florian's profession, his former warm home, and his personality, behavior, and aspirations make him truly special to me. I also like his two-faced complexity and moral ambiguity, with the contrast on his kindness and hidden darkness.
favourite_character_p4: To Conclude: At first, I only thought Florian looked cool because of the Fire Investigator design. But after reading his story and personality, Florian slowly became my one true favorite character in Identity V.
favourite_character_p5: Anyway, who can refuse to like a kind, handsome Fire Investigator with a charming smile?
fun_fact_q1: What is your most used Costume for the Fire Investigator?
fun_fact_a1_body: I buy all skin except the S-Tier (TBH: I am regret for that) for Florian. However, my most favourite skin is the original skin - The one of blue firefighter uniform. I guess it is because it look more "professional" and "hero"?
fun_fact_a2_2: Previous name is uncle-jayden, but it's too long to type so I shortened it to uJayden.
fun_fact_a3: I am from Hong Kong! I can speak Cantonese, English, and Mandarin, so feel free to communicate with me in any of these languages!
fun_fact_a4_1: I am a university student. When I not doing my assignments or studying, I like watch YouTube, chat with friends, and play games (including IdentityV of course!). I am also interested in technology and programming, so I like to build some small projects in my free time.
fun_fact_a4_2: I play these games other than IdentityV: Honkai: Star Rail, Minecraft, Cities: Skylines, Oxygen Not Included, Danganronpa series, etc.
fun_fact_q5: More about my path outside of games
fun_fact_a5_1: I am a student who is currently studying at Land Surveying and Geo-Informatics Department in The Hong Kong Polytechnic University.
fun_fact_a5_2: When will IdentityV add a Geographer? Wait, that's Lawyer, as he has a Map......?
fun_fact_a6_1: My friend refer me on secondary school Form 1. We used to play together, but this is a long time ago and we don't play together anymore.
fun_fact_a6_2: For now, I just play because of Florian Brand, the Fire Investigator.
fun_fact_q7: What other characters do you like?
fun_fact_q9: Why I Made This Profile site?
fun_fact_a9: Cuz everyone is making one on lit.link. So I want to build a more personalized one on my own domain with more freedom and customization.
faq_add_friend_q: Can I add your friend in the game?
faq_add_friend_a: Yes, sure! But please remember to clarify who you are or state the reason for the friend request. Sorry, but I may not accept friend requests from strangers without any introduction.
faq_cp_q: What Couple (CP) / Combination (CB) do you like / dislike in the game?
faq_cp_a1: None. I do not have any particular likes or dislikes regarding any CP or CB in the game.
faq_cp_a2: It is completely okay if you like that. I am fine with any CP or CB in the game, including those involving Florian. I just don't have any preferences or dislikes on that. This is just my personal preference, and I respect everyone's choices.
faq_cp_a3: This involved but not limited to: Florian x Matthias, Florian x Richard, Wax Artist x Forward, etc.
faq_social_q: Can I add your friend on Discord / Instagram? How long do you need to reply to my messages?
faq_social_a1: Maybe in the future, but currently I prefer to keep my social media accounts private and only share them with close friends. Sorry for any inconvenience.
faq_social_a2: Maybe @ujayden_25 on Instagram & Threads! Go to uJayden_25 on Instagram or Threads.
faq_social_a3: I seldom check or I will ignore DMs on social media, so if you want to contact me, please send me an email to admin@ujayden.com.
faq_opinion_q: Looks like I have having different opinions with you on the game / gender issues / AI Content Generation / Politics. Can I follow you / add you as a friend?
faq_opinion_a: Of course! People can have different opinions, and I respect that. I am not a kid that decline for people with different opinions.
faq_dealbreaker_a1: Maybe not. I seldom block or restrict people on social media.
faq_dealbreaker_a2: However, please do not make joke / inappropriate content about Florian Brand. Do not send DM about that.
faq_dealbreaker_a3: And let's make conversation in a respectful way. Try not to have toxic or aggressive conversations. Respect is the key to communication.
faq_dealbreaker_a4: If you got blocked / restricted / unfollowed by me on social media, it usually because you post inappropriate content about Florian Brand, or making toxic content on gender issues.
feature_under_development_text: This feature is not available yet. I will implement it as soon as possible.
